creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Created attachment 254490
net-im/ejabberd update to 24.7

Hi,

I modified Ashish's private patch to build latest (24.7) version, and it does build, install and run for me on two 14.1 amd64 jails. I did some changes in options, feel free to change those (removed STUN option as it is enabled by default, removed TOOLS option to simplify).

Some remarks:
- on clean install in test (ipv4-only, non-vnet) jail, I had to set up real IP address instead of '::' in modules config, otherwise ejabberd refused to start and complained in ejabberd.log. Perhaps this doesn't apply to different, non-jailed setups.
- on clean install in abovementioned jail, I had to copy inetrc.example to inetrc (leaving contents as it is), as well as copy ejabberdctl.cfg.example to ejabberdctl.cfg (setting it as below), otherwise I would have problems with service commands (start, status, stop)
- on one production server (-DOCS +MYSQL) I think (not 100% sure) pkg upgrade deleted my inetrc file, I had to copy it from example again.

ejabberdct.cfg:
ERL_MAX_PORTS=65536
FIREWALL_WINDOW=4200-4210
ERL_EPMD_ADDRESS=10.20.30.40 (server's ip address)

So, upgrade needs some additional checks and actions from admins besides usual pkg upgrade and restart we got used to over last few years, but I think it's worth the effort (better than having year-old version). Perhaps we could test some more (one of my production servers already runs 24.7), hopefully get some more feedback here, and give instruction in pkg-message and UPDATING.

Regards,
